sections.text: Both siphons and pumps move fluid upward, but they work differently:

Feature	Siphon	Pump
Power	Passive (no energy)	Active (costs EU/t)
Pressure	Weak (fill-level based)	Strong (can reach 32,000 mBar)
Height Limit	~16 blocks	Up to 320 blocks (IV)
Best for	Small early setups	Main production lines
Cost	Just pipes	Requires machine+energy
Reliability	Fluctuates with fill	Stable + adjustable
For reliable, high-throughput fluid systems, always use pumps. Siphons are an elegant solution for simple gravity-fed designs or when you do not yet have access to pump technology.
